_note: ILLUSTRATIVE ONLY — placeholder values for build/testnet. Final supply, allocations, treasury and reserve parameters require written authorization from the issuer before any mainnet deployment (Build Plan P20). Do not hard-code these values; they are configured at deploy time.

reserve._note: Target 1:1 reserve backing — illustrative; actual ratio set by issuer + attestor.

fees._note: No transfer fee by default; the token contract intentionally has no transfer tax.
